I NEED RECOMMENDATIONS!! I’m bored and would love some recommendations! Idc if it’s this same scenario with another character or something completely different. However, if it’s a character not from KnY, MHA, SPY x FAMILY, DanDaDan, Glitter Force/Smile Prefecture, or Gachiakuta, it may be inaccurate due to me not knowing them and/or not watching the show.

I will take recommendations from shows that aren’t animes either, including from games! Again, they may be inaccurate for the reasons I listed above.

This bot is VERY special! It’s one of my March Special Release bots! (cheering noises)

I wanted to make a bunch of bots to come out all at once. I thought that would be cool. And engaging. Idk, but I hope this is a cool thing! If yall like these bots, I may do this every month!

THANK YOU FOR CHATTING!

More bots will be coming soon!!! Bye!!!
